name: Маска Рога
notes: The Horn's Mask, the voice of the Defense of the First Adit on Kragmir's big arena. The bearer carries the great bronze horn that 'wakes the mine': his blasts time the show, call the reinforcement wave, and carry the founders' blessing. A warpriest-style support caster flavored as ancestral rites: he blesses and mends the Five, moves the line with a marching note, frightens raiders with the Roar, and throws a warded note over an ally about to be hit. If the Horn falls silent, the wave arrives late and unblessed.

actions.name: Roar of the First Adit
actions.text:
Frequency once per fight.

The bearer sounds the great horn and the mountain answers. Each enemy in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] attempts a @Check[type:will|dc:25] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened] 1.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Frightened] 2.

actions.name: Pace of the Mine
actions.text: The horn beats a marching note. Each ally within 60 feet who can hear it can Step as a free action.

actions.name: Ancestral Ward
actions.text:
Trigger An ally within 30 feet is targeted by an attack from an attacker the Horn can see.

Effect A short warding note cuts across the arena. The ally gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

actions.name: The Horn Keeps Time
actions.text: Allies within 60 feet who can hear the horn gain a +1 status bonus to saves against emotion and fear effects.

actions.name: Steady Spellcasting
actions.text: Years of casting through a roaring crowd. If a reaction would disrupt the Horn's spellcasting action, he attempts a @Check[type:flat|dc:15] check. On a success, the spell is cast successfully.

description.value: The great bronze horn of the Defense of the First Adit, property of the Kragmir arena. Its voice times the show: the blessing, the marching note, the Roar, and the waking of the mine. A stage relic, not a magic item; the arena wants it back after the bout.
